query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Based on the FERC eLibrary search, Google (including Google LLC and Google Energy LLC) submitted filings under the following docket numbers between June and December 2024:

*   **AD24-11-000** (Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC, filed Dec 10, 2024)
*   **ER10-2835-012** (Triennial Market Power Analysis for Southwest Power Pool Inc. Region, filed Dec 27, 2024)
*   **ER10-2835-011** (Supplement to Notice of Change in Status, filed Nov 5, 2024)
*   **ER10-468-005** (Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region, filed Jun 28, 2024)
*   **ER24-2888-000, ER24-2889-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2891-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000** (Motion to Intervene of Google LLC, filed Sep 19, 2024)

steps.content:
Based on the FERC eLibrary search, Google (including Google LLC and Google Energy LLC) submitted filings under the following docket numbers between June and December 2024:

*   **AD24-11-000** (Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC, filed Dec 10, 2024)
*   **ER10-2835-012** (Triennial Market Power Analysis for Southwest Power Pool Inc. Region, filed Dec 27, 2024)
*   **ER10-2835-011** (Supplement to Notice of Change in Status, filed Nov 5, 2024)
*   **ER10-468-005** (Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region, filed Jun 28, 2024)
*   **ER24-2888-000, ER24-2889-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2891-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000** (Motion to Intervene of Google LLC, filed Sep 19, 2024)
